    Index

    A C D E F G H I L M P R S T U V 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    P

    pcs - Variable in Klasse model.ProjectModel
    The support mechanism for managing event listeners and firing property changes.
    progressLabel - Variable in Klasse view.MainView
    The label displaying the overall progress and completion status of tasks.
    ProjectModel - Klasse in model
    Manages the list of tasks for the project management tool.
    ProjectModel() - Konstruktor für Klasse model.ProjectModel
    Creates a new project model initialized with an empty list of tasks.
    propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Methode in Klasse controller.TaskController
    Responds to property change events triggered by the model.
    A C D E F G H I L M P R S T U V
